attributes.action: Lifetime driving ban and higher prison sentence for death by dangerous driving
attributes.additional_details: Too many people are getting let off lightly for killing others due to reckless driving, speeding, DUI etc
attributes.background: Increase the the minimum sentence to 30 years served full and lifetime driving ban for committing death by dangerous driving

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Life in prison for causing death by dangerous driving due to drinking / drugs
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758501

Mandate a lifetime driving ban for causing death by dangerous driving
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/740267
